info.name: DummyJSON - Full API Suite (perf-studio)
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the public DummyJSON API (https://dummyjson.com), generated for use as a load/performance/functional test fixture in perf-studio.

Contains 111 saved requests across 13 folders, covering every resource documented at https://dummyjson.com/docs as of 2026-07-04: Auth, Products, Carts, Recipes, Users, Posts, Comments, Todos, Quotes, Tools (2FA/custom mock), Dynamic Image generation, and Mock HTTP status codes.

DummyJSON's underlying route surface is ~85 distinct documented endpoints; some of those are saved here multiple times with different query parameters (pagination, sorting, field selection, search, delay) to give dedicated, ready-to-run test cases for each documented capability. No endpoint in this collection was invented - every request maps to a path shown in the official docs.

Notes:
- DummyJSON is a free fake/test REST API explicitly intended for prototyping and testing; POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE calls simulate the operation and return a plausible response but do not persist changes.
- No true bulk endpoints are documented for this API (no bulk insert/update/delete) - none are included here rather than invented.
- Auth: POST '01 - Authentication / Login' first; a test script stores accessToken/refreshToken into the active environment automatically.

item.name: 00 - Utilities
item.description: Housekeeping routes used to sanity-check connectivity before running a full test plan.

request.description: Returns the IP address of the caller.

item.name: 01 - Authentication
item.description: Token-based auth flow. Login stores tokens into the environment automatically via a test script.

request.description: Primary login endpoint. On success, the test script stores accessToken/refreshToken into the environment for use by other requests.

originalRequest.description: Primary login endpoint. On success, the test script stores accessToken/refreshToken into the environment for use by other requests.

request.description: Legacy singular alias of /auth/login, documented alongside the users resource.

item.name: 02 - Products
item.description: Full product catalog CRUD, search, category browsing and sorting/pagination examples.

query.description: Artificially delays the response by N ms - useful for latency/timeout test scenarios

request.description: DummyJSON supports a delay= query param on list endpoints, handy for simulating slow backends in load tests.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "{{newProductTitle}}",
  "description": "Product description",
  "price": 19.99,
  "discountPercentage": 5.0,
  "rating": 4.5,
  "stock": 50,
  "category": "stationery",
  "brand": "BMW",
  "tags": [
    "pencil",
    "writing"
  ],
  "sku": "BMW001",
  "weight": 0.1,
  "dimensions": {
    "width": 1.0,
    "height": 20.0,
    "depth": 1.0
  },
  "warrantyInformation": "1 year warranty",
  "shippingInformation": "Ships in 1 week",
  "availabilityStatus": "In Stock",
  "returnPolicy": "30 days return policy",
  "minimumOrderQuantity": 1
}

item.name: 03 - Carts
item.description: Shopping cart CRUD and per-user cart lookup.

request.description: merge=true keeps existing products and merges in the new ones; omit/false replaces the cart.

item.name: 04 - Recipes
item.description: Recipe catalog CRUD, tag/meal-type browsing, search, sorting and pagination.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Tasty Pizza",
  "ingredients": [
    "Pizza dough",
    "Tomato sauce",
    "Mozzarella cheese"
  ],
  "instructions": [
    "Preheat oven",
    "Add toppings",
    "Bake"
  ],
  "prepTimeMinutes": 20,
  "cookTimeMinutes": 15,
  "servings": 4,
  "difficulty": "Easy",
  "cuisine": "Italian",
  "caloriesPerServing": 300,
  "tags": [
    "Pizza",
    "Italian"
  ],
  "mealType": [
    "Dinner"
  ]
}

item.name: 05 - Users
item.description: User directory CRUD, nested address/bank/company payloads, filter/search/sort, and per-user relations.

item.name: 06 - Posts
item.description: Blog post CRUD, tag browsing, per-user posts, nested comments, search/sort/pagination.

response.name: Get Post By Id - 200 OK

item.name: 07 - Comments
item.description: Comment CRUD, nested reviewer/user object, per-post comment lookup.

item.name: 08 - Todos
item.description: Todo CRUD, random todo, per-user todos, pagination.

response.name: Get Todo By Id - 200 OK

item.name: 09 - Quotes
item.description: Read-only quotes resource (no add/update/delete is documented for this resource).

response.name: Get Quote By Id - 200 OK

item.name: 10 - Tools
item.description: Utility tools: TOTP generation and custom mock-response creation.

request.description: Generates a live TOTP code for the given base32 secret.
Registers a custom JSON payload and returns a URL that replays it (expires after 90 days, max 300KB).

item.name: 11 - Dynamic Image Generator
item.description: Placeholder/dynamic image generation used for realistic media fields in test payloads.

item.name: 12 - Mock HTTP Responses
item.description: Arbitrary HTTP status code mocking - useful for negative/error-path test cases.
